Message: [RRC]   in configuration file, bad drb_ciphering value 'invalid_yes_no', only 'yes' and 'no' allowed
Event Description: Invalid DRB ciphering parameter; CU config parse fails and aborts. Without CU, NGAP/F1 cannot form and UE cannot connect.
